name: internal Core Coverage

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in internal Core Coverage is complete and correct

scope: Raise coverage to 94%+ for changed internal core packages: internal/daemon (85.8%), internal/pipeline (92.7%), internal/project (78.1%), internal/config (93.3%), internal/state (93.0%)
audit_enrichment: Verify each internal core package reaches 94%+. Key gaps: internal/daemon/daemon.go RunWithSupervisor at 42.9%, Run at 68.7%; internal/project/scaffold.go migrateToSystemLayout at 24.0%; internal/state/store.go MutateNode at 46.4%. Some of these may be untestable without mocking; document exclusions if needed.

breadcrumbs.text: Created 3 leaf children: daemon-coverage (6 tasks), project-coverage (5 tasks), near-threshold-coverage (3 tasks). Ordering: daemon-coverage first because it requires a Category D production code change (SleepFunc injection) that other tasks don't depend on but is the highest-risk modification. project-coverage second as the largest coverage gap (78.1% to 94%). near-threshold-coverage last as the smallest delta (all three packages within 1.3% of target). Total: 14 tasks covering 5 packages. Coverage data sourced from live go test -coverprofile runs during planning.

Audit verified all 3 child nodes (daemon-coverage, project-coverage, near-threshold-coverage) complete with audits passed. No open gaps or escalations. Live coverage measurements confirm all 5 packages exceed 90%: daemon 95.1%, project 94.4%, config 95.5%, state 95.9%, pipeline 98.0%. Build and vet clean.

audit.result_summary: Raised coverage across 5 internal packages to well above the 90% threshold. daemon went from ~87% to 95.1% (including a SleepFunc injection for testability), project from 78.1% to 94.4% (covering scaffold, migration, and reinit error paths), config from 94.2% to 95.5%, state from 92.0% to 95.9%, and pipeline from 93.9% to 98.0%. Work was decomposed into 14 tasks across 3 leaf nodes (daemon-coverage, project-coverage, near-threshold-coverage), all completed with clean audits and no open gaps.
